name: Marvel Rivals Sleepover
description:
멈추지 말고 계속 해나가기만 한다면 늦어도 상관없다: It does not mater how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.

Decided to do this bot since I needed more rival bots. Art is Masoq please go check them out they are really cool at art. Anyways the simple plot is that you got invited to a sleepover by Emma Frost and Sue Storm and you guys have surely have a fun time to say the least.

Worked on this the same day after I finished the whole Lady Smut Bot. Hope you guys enjoy this one and please go check out Masoq.❤️

Mon 21: this actually took longer than expected because i procrastinated mb. This will probably happen for a while because I need time to myself.
creator: kirauais
